title: PSA: @immutable has now signed over 700 games, with over $2B in total funding.
message_html: PSA: @immutable has now signed over 700 games, with over $2B in total funding. ...
snippet: Robbie Ferguson | Immutable (@0xferg): PSA: @immutable has now signed over 700 games, with over $2B in total funding. 90% are still in the pipeline, and will launch post CLARITY Act into the most insanely pro-crypto environment we've ever seen.
